路飞：“李牧，快变那个会喷火的超能人，我要吃烤肉！”
索隆：“这家伙变身的快闪之星，我竟然连残影都看不见？”
而对于娜美和罗宾来说，李牧简直是“全能男友”。
“李牧，天气太热了，变个‘大钢牙’带我去海底避暑吧？”
“李牧，这个行李太重了，快变‘四手霸王’帮我搬一下，顺便……帮我按个摩？”
李牧看着围在身边的众女神，无奈地拨动表盘：我这超能仪，怎么全用在奇怪的地方了？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocdf51ea37cd77b73078aa561a6da1cdd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"澜菜鸡","author_id":"","book_id":"7615559915280550937","book_name":"航海：草帽船上的全能变身者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9280人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":858,"name":"轻小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=858&name=轻小说&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7615560014723613209","read_count":"9280","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"202304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"65","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,轻小说,穿越,海贼,全能,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ocdf51ea37cd77b73078aa561a6da1cdd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317547&x-signature=9pSsRkjHG7L7gZNtX6rJd83I3DY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2375372381625133","extra":{"comment_jump_
